nodes.name: Fraser's forest flycatcher
nodes.summary: Fraser's forest flycatcher（Fraseria ocreata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Fraser's forest flycatcher。

nodes.name: Fraser's forest flycatcher
nodes.summary: Fraser's forest flycatcher (Fraseria ocreata), also known as the African forest-flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found throughout the intra-tropical rainforest of Sub-Saharan Africa. References
nodes.shortSummary: Fraser's forest flycatcher (Fraseria ocreata), also known as the African forest-flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae…

nodes.name: Fraseria
nodes.summary: Fraseria（Fraseria）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如White-browed forest flycatcher、Fraser's forest flycatcher、Grey-throated tit-flycatcher等8种鸟类。
